prestazioni: Engine swap to a Fiat FireFly 1.5L Turbo (FCA GSE T4) with a custom ECU remap by Alientech KESS3, targeting 220 HP at 6,000 RPM and 280 Nm of torque at 3,500 RPM via a Garrett GT2259 turbocharger, upgraded fuel system with Bosch 350 LPH fuel pump and Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler for optimized backpressure

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential for the front axle, a custom-built transfer case with a 4.10:1 gear ratio by Tran-X, and a reinforced clutch system from Sachs Performance (clutch kit 3000 955 001) paired with a lightweight flywheel from Fidanza (221031)

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (kit DFV 18-00-01) featuring 30-way adjustable damping, custom polybushings from SuperPro (SPF1037K) for the front control arms, and a reinforced subframe brace from Sabelt (part no. 007-00-100) to handle increased power and off-road stress
estetica: Custom widebody kit by Novitec (Panda 4x4-specific design) with carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser, finished in a matte Fiat Grigio Moda (code 690) with gloss black accents

BBS RG-R 15-inch wheels (7J ET35) wrapped in 195/70R15 BFGoodrich All-Terrain T/A KO2 tires, paired with custom wheel spacers from H&R (5mm front, 10mm rear) for aggressive stance and improved off-road clearance

Full interior reupholstery with Recaro Pole Position seats (custom-fitted to the Panda's chassis), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (part no. FIA-001) painted in Satin Black for weight reduction and structural rigidity
